cases.title: Cross-Border Spirits Brand
cases.description: Cross-border CPG brands lose money to the same recurring failure: stockouts at retail, broken visibility between brand, distributor, and retailer data, and operations buried in dashboards nobody has time to read. We deploy AI agents that run demand forecasting, reorder cycles, void recovery, and cash-flow management end-to-end — turning the ops team into operators of agents, not consumers of dashboards.
cases.quote: We stopped reading dashboards. The agents read them, and they tell us what to do next.

cases.title: Enterprise Loyalty Platform
cases.description: A 20-year-old loyalty platform serving Mexico's largest banks and entertainment companies, restructuring as AI-native or falling behind. We embed as turnaround operators, redesign the operating model around AI input/output quality, pivot the platform from app-outsourcing to API-first, ship a WhatsApp product line that becomes the differentiated enterprise offering, and architect the automation backbone that runs the company day-to-day.
cases.quote: From app outsourcing to AI-native platform — senior roles productized as agents that ship the same expertise to every customer instantly.
